vocab.example: Old master paintings have stood the test of time, remaining relevant and admired centuries after their creation.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ những khuôn mẫu cũ, làm điều gì đó khác biệt hoàn toàn
vocab.example: Modern art often seeks to break the mold by experimenting with unconventional materials like plastic or digital pixels.

vocab.meaning: một sự khác biệt cực kỳ lớn/trời vực
vocab.example: There is a world of difference between the meticulous brushwork of the Renaissance and the chaotic splashes of abstract expressionism.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua những giới hạn thông thường để đổi mới
vocab.example: Contemporary installations really push the envelope in terms of what can be considered art, often involving audience participation.

vocab.meaning: mất đi ý nghĩa nguyên bản (khi thay đổi hình thức/bối cảnh)
vocab.example: The subtle religious symbolism in old art is sometimes lost in translation for modern viewers who lack a theological background.

vocab.meaning: thể hiện sự tôn trọng hoặc gợi nhớ đến (một phong cách/người nào đó)
vocab.example: Some modern pieces give a nod to classical techniques while subverting the subject matter entirely.

vocab.meaning: điều gì đó gợi suy nghĩ, trăn trở
vocab.example: Modern conceptual art is designed to provide food for thought rather than just aesthetic pleasure.
In contemporary works, there is often a fine line between a masterpiece and a mere gimmick.

vocab.meaning: nắm vững kỹ năng/cách thức thực hiện cơ bản
vocab.example: In the past, apprentices spent years learning to master the ropes of mixing pigments before they were allowed to paint a full canvas.

vocab.word: in a league of its own
vocab.meaning: ở một đẳng cấp riêng biệt, không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: The craftsmanship found in ancient sculptures is in a league of its own, reaching a level of detail that modern machines struggle to replicate.
